task_completion.description: Navigate to the Customers module in Manager.io
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Customers' tab is highlighted in the left navigation menu, and the main screen displays the list of customers.

task_completion.description: Open the existing 'Ernst Handel' customer record for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit form for a customer is visible, and the 'Name' field contains exactly 'Ernst Handel'.

task_completion.description: Update the billing address to the new specified address
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Billing Address' text area contains 'Musterstraße 42', 'Wien 1010', and 'Austria'. It must NOT contain the old address parts 'Kirchgasse 6' or 'Graz 8010'.

task_completion.description: Update the email address to the new specified email
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Email' input field contains 'e.handel@ernsthandel.at'. It must NOT contain the old email 'ernst.handel@example.at'.
The agent clicks the 'Update' button at the bottom of the form, or the screen transitions back to the Customers list showing the updated details.

task_completion.description: Ensure no new customer record was created (no duplicates)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Customers list view, there is exactly one row for 'Ernst Handel', confirming the existing record was updated rather than a new one being created.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Manager.io web interface, not terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Manager.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Manager.io layout (left sidebar, main content area) and is not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not directly edit the backend database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of SQLite browsers, command-line database edits, or file manipulation of the Manager.io data files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Customer: 'Ernst Handel'. Expected Address: Must include 'Musterstraße 42', 'Wien 1010', and 'Austria'. Expected Email: 'e.handel@ernsthandel.at'. Forbidden (Old) Address: 'Kirchgasse 6', 'Graz 8010'. Forbidden (Old) Email: 'ernst.handel@example.at'. The task must be performed in the 'Customers' module of Manager.io.
